assertions.title: Pipeline Auto-Trigger on Analyzing State

steps.action: Create a fresh browser account and land on /studies
steps.expected: A live analyzed study could be inspected through the product surface
steps.observed: The fresh org opened on an empty Studies list with only create-study CTAs.

steps.expected: A visible path to create the prerequisites for a live analyzed study
steps.observed: The wizard stopped at “No persona packs available”, so the live surface offered no path to an analyzed study in this org.

steps.action: Check the only populated analysis route available in the app
steps.expected: A browser-visible overview or analyzing lifecycle could be observed
steps.observed: /studies/demo-study/overview crashed with an ArgumentValidationError instead of exposing an analyzing/completed lifecycle.

evidence.consoleErrors: demo-study overview route rendered a Convex ArgumentValidationError for invalid studyId "demo-study"
evidence.network: No live study/analyzing transition was reachable from the browser surface in the fresh org.

assertions.issues: Blocked: the real live browser surface never reached an analyzing study, and the only populated demo route does not expose a working overview lifecycle.

assertions.title: Per-Run Summarization Produces Structured Output

steps.action: Inspect the fresh org after signup
steps.expected: A completed analyzed study with terminal runs would be available to inspect
steps.observed: The org had no studies or persona packs.

steps.action: Open the populated demo run/detail routes to look for live structured summary artifacts
steps.expected: A real run-summary artifact shape tied to the active org
steps.observed: Only canned demo run content and data-URL artifact links were visible, not a live analyzed-study summary surface.

evidence.network: No browser-visible live run-summary artifact or report generated by the fresh org was reachable.

assertions.issues: Blocked: the browser surface did not provide a real analyzed study whose terminal runs exposed structured summary output.

assertions.title: Infra-Error and Cancelled Runs Excluded from Clustering

steps.action: Inspect the live fresh-org studies surface
steps.expected: A completed analyzed study with mixed run outcomes could be reviewed
steps.observed: No studies existed and study creation was blocked by the lack of persona packs.

steps.action: Inspect the populated demo findings/report routes
steps.expected: A user-visible way to prove infra_error/cancelled exclusion rules
steps.observed: The demo routes showed only canned hard_fail/soft_fail examples and did not prove live infra_error or cancelled handling.

evidence.network: No live clustered report with infra_error/cancelled runs was reachable from the browser.

assertions.issues: Blocked: the user surface never exposed a real clustered study where infra_error/cancelled handling could be verified.

assertions.title: Issue Clusters Contain Required Fields

steps.action: Open the findings and report routes with populated cards
steps.expected: Every required IssueCluster field would be user-visible for inspection
steps.observed: Cards exposed summary fields, but raw schema-only fields such as evidenceKeys and score were not fully visible in the browser.

evidence.network: The browser surface did not expose full raw IssueCluster records for schema-level validation.

assertions.issues: Blocked: the browser only showed card summaries, not the full required raw IssueCluster shape.

assertions.title: Clusters Ranked by Descending Impact Score

steps.action: Inspect the ranked issue cards on the populated report route
steps.expected: A live analyzed study would expose ranked clusters with score proof
steps.observed: The demo report displayed ranked cards, but the underlying score values and live issueClusterIds provenance were not visible from the browser.

evidence.network: No browser-visible score payloads were exposed.

assertions.issues: Blocked: ranking order was visible only on the demo route, without user-surface proof of live descending impact scores.

assertions.title: Pipeline Fails Gracefully on AI Errors

steps.action: Look for a browser-visible way to drive a live study into analysis and induce an AI error
steps.expected: A controllable analysis failure path would be reachable from the live surface
steps.observed: The fresh org could not create a study because no persona packs existed, and no live analysis entry point or fault-injection control was exposed.

evidence.network: No user-visible AI failure path was reachable through the browser.

assertions.issues: Blocked: the browser surface did not expose a way to trigger or observe a real analysis failure transition.

assertions.title: Replay Confidence Zero Never Outranks Positive

steps.action: Inspect populated findings/report routes for replay-confidence ordering evidence
steps.expected: Two comparable live clusters would expose enough detail to prove the ranking rule
steps.observed: Only canned demo cards were visible, without live score math or a real zero-vs-positive confidence comparison.

evidence.network: No browser-visible score payloads or confidence-comparison controls were available.

assertions.issues: Blocked: the user surface did not prove the zero-confidence ranking rule on live analysis output.

frictions.description: Fresh orgs start empty and the live study wizard hard-stops at “No persona packs available”, so no live analyzed study could be created from the browser during this run.
frictions.resolution: Used the built-in demo-study routes only to understand what populated analysis UI currently looks like.

blockers.description: /studies/demo-study/overview crashes with a Convex ArgumentValidationError instead of providing a working populated overview companion to the demo findings/report routes.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reloaded the route directly; the same error surface remained.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 7 blocked because the live browser surface exposed no analyzed study and the demo overview route is broken.
